pattern:nestjs+mongodb:app-module.content: // app.module.ts MongoDB: MongooseModule.forRoot(process.env.MONGODB_URI||'mongodb://localhost:27017/app'). ONLY add modules that exist. NOT JwtModule/Redis/Kafka unless requested.

pattern:nestjs:dto.content: // dto.ts: import {PartialType} from '@nestjs/mapped-types' (NEVER @nestjs/common). export class UpdateBookDto extends PartialType(CreateBookDto) {}

qa:partialtype-mapped-types.content:
PartialType: ALWAYS from '@nestjs/mapped-types'
CORRECT: import { PartialType } from '@nestjs/mapped-types';
WRONG:   import { PartialType } from '@nestjs/common';   ← does NOT exist
WRONG:   import { PartialType } from '@nestjs/swagger';  ← avoid
